mechanism: Intercalates DNA and inhibits topoisomerase II
Inhibits histone deacetylases, leading to increased acetylation
Inhibits Janus kinases and downstream signaling
Inhibits DNA synthesis and induces apoptosis
Inhibits ribonucleotide reductase, reducing DNA synthesis
Inhibits exportin 1, leading to accumulation of tumor suppressors

Decreases glucose production and improves insulin sensitivity
Modulates immune response and inhibits angiogenesis
